SEARCH
Package cor

Class ConfidentialityHandler

java.lang.Object
cor.ConfidentialityHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
DocumentHandler
public class ConfidentialityHandler extends Object implements DocumentHandler
Handler for checking the confidentiality status of a document. Ensures that only confidential documents are marked as valid.

    • ConfidentialityHandler

      public ConfidentialityHandler()

  • Method Details

    • setNextHandler

      public void setNextHandler(DocumentHandler nextHandler)
      Sets the next handler in the chain.
      Specified by:
      setNextHandler in interface DocumentHandler
      Parameters:
      nextHandler - the next handler to process the document.

    • handle

      public void handle(Document document)
      Validates the document's confidentiality. If the document is not confidential, it marks the document as invalid. Passes the document to the next handler if available.
      Specified by:
      handle in interface DocumentHandler
      Parameters:
      document - the document to be validated.
